title: Daylight Responsive Lighting
description: Function block for constant brightness control. Requires a well-positioned sensor that quickly detects the brightness in the room.

inputs.description: Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input.

outputs.description: Supported are: Smart Actuator RGBW or WW, Lumitech, RGB, 0-100%, 0-10V, 1-10V. If multiple actuators are connected, they must be of the same type.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: If the difference between target and actual value is greater than this hysteresis, the controller will adjust.
The larger the step size, the quicker the target value is reached. However, large steps may cause the light change to be visible.

properties.description: This brightness is to be maintained when the controller is active.
Determine the target brightness to be maintained when the controller is active.
